title: Supercapacitor And Battery Build   Welding The Tabs
description:
I was asked toinclude how the tabs were welding in the battery build video so here it is - we use the same materials for the supercapacitor as the battery and you can get the bits from our shop  - you can buy the bits you need at our shop. For the conductive plastic go here https://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-materials/product-is-conductive-carbon-black-filled-hdpe-hi-density-poly-ethylene-30cm-x-30cm/
and for the 2mm carbon felt go here https://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-materials/activated-carbon-felt/
